description: Create an attentional blink experiment in PsychoPy Builder to study the phenomenon where detecting a second target (T2) in a rapid stream of stimuli is impaired if it appears 200-500ms after the first target (T1). Build an RSVP (Rapid Serial Visual Presentation) experiment saved as /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/attentional_blink.psyexp. The experiment must include routines for instructions, a fixation cross, an RSVP stream (presenting letters at approximately 100ms per item using a Code component), a T1 identification response, and a T2 presence response. Wrap the trial routines in a loop referencing a conditions file. The conditions file must be saved at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/ab_conditions.csv and include columns for 'lag' (integer) and 'T2_present' (1/0 or yes/no), with at least 4 different lag values and 20 rows of data.
